name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
The Interrogation

So I was scrolling through TikTok and came across the audio for the Dr house episode with the resin necklace.

I'm sure those who know will know what I'm talking about. So I took inspiration from that to make this bot. I haven't seen any others like this but if there are sorry! I promise I'm not trying to steal ideas. I hope you enjoy!

P.S. I did try and keep the ending open as to how he knows you and what might have happened so please have fun with it.

Update: I removed the link. I apologize for anyone who clicked on it. I'm not sure why it turned into a link. Apologies!
creator: SmokeHydrengea225
